name: Ted Lasso
description: The Apple TV+ comedy about an American football coach leading an English Premier League club

questions.q: Which American comedian-actor plays Ted Lasso?

source.notes: Won Golden Globe, SAG, and Primetime Emmy for the role.

questions.q: On which streaming platform does Ted Lasso air?

source.notes: One of Apple TV+'s most-watched original series.

questions.q: What is the name of the fictional English football club Ted Lasso coaches?

source.notes: Nickname: the Greyhounds.

questions.q: Who plays Rebecca Welton, the AFC Richmond owner?

source.notes: Won the 2021 Emmy for Outstanding Supporting Actress in a Comedy.

questions.q: Which English comedian plays the gruff veteran midfielder Roy Kent?

source.notes: Originally joined as a writer; won two Emmys for Supporting Actor in a Comedy.

questions.q: What single-word motto is displayed on Ted's office sign?

source.notes: Central visual motif; taped up above the door.

questions.q: In what year did Ted Lasso premiere on Apple TV+?

source.notes: Became a breakout hit during the pandemic.

questions.q: Which actress plays Keeley Jones, the model-turned-PR executive?

source.notes: Temple also appeared in The Offer and Fargo.

questions.q: Who plays the mild-mannered kit-manager-turned-coach Nathan 'Nate' Shelley?

source.notes: Also a successful stand-up comedian in the UK.

questions.q: Which Scrubs creator co-developed Ted Lasso alongside Jason Sudeikis?

source.notes: Also created Spin City and Shrinking.

questions.q: Which laconic bearded assistant coach is played by co-creator Brendan Hunt?

source.notes: Ted's longtime best friend and assistant.

questions.q: Who plays Jamie Tartt, AFC Richmond's arrogant young striker?

source.notes: The 'Jamie Tartt do-do do-do-do' chant became a signature.

questions.q: Which real English Premier League ground stands in for AFC Richmond's Nelson Road?

source.notes: Home of Crystal Palace in South London.

questions.q: What sport did Ted Lasso coach before being hired by AFC Richmond?

source.notes: Wichita State Shockers NCAA Division II football in-show.

questions.q: How many seasons does Ted Lasso's original run cover?

source.notes: Creators originally planned a three-season arc; Season 3 finale aired 2023.

questions.q: Which character is widely modeled on the famously grizzled footballer Roy Keane?

source.notes: Keane was a Manchester United captain known for his temper.

questions.q: Which young Nigerian right back becomes one of the team's emotional anchors?

source.notes: Played by Toheeb Jimoh.

questions.q: Which Mexican striker is known for shouting 'Football is life!'?

source.notes: Played by Cristo Fernández.

questions.q: Ted Lasso evolved from character sketches Jason Sudeikis first performed for which network's Premier League promos?

source.notes: First aired in 2013 when NBC Sports acquired US Premier League rights.

questions.q: Who plays Rupert Mannion, Rebecca's slimy ex-husband?

source.notes: Anthony Head is also known for Buffy the Vampire Slayer.

questions.q: Which character is introduced in Season 2 as the team's sports psychologist?

source.notes: Played by Sarah Niles.

questions.q: How many Primetime Emmys did Ted Lasso win for its first season, including Outstanding Comedy Series?

source.notes: Season 1 received 20 nominations and won 7 Emmys.
